prose.en: Providers MUST notify all necessary parties within 5 business days after completing the verification, assessment, and/or validation of transformative changes, also including the following information:

following-information: Updates to all previously sent information
Summary of any new risks identified and/or vulnerabilities resulting from the change (if applicable)
Copy of the security assessment report (if applicable)

required-artifacts: At least the most recent after verification SCN notification for a transformative change including the date it was sent and the date the change was applied. Additional examples may be provided. If no transformative SCN notifications have been sent then this artifact is not required.
